calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-06-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, Judge Presiding. Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Respondent, Alex Belenson appears in Pro Per; Appellant, James M. Reid appears in Pro Per.
Parties and witnesses previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.
Respondents exhibits:
EXHR1 Correspondence
EXHR2 Correspondence
EXHR3 Estimates
EXHR4 Estimates
EXHR5 Photos showing unfinished tile work
EXHR6 Photos showing finished worked
EXHR7 Photos showing tile work
EXHR8 Designer plans for revision
EXHR9 Estimates for repair
EXHR10 Emails (inclusive exhibit)
Appellant's exhibits:
Mr. Reid calls Ron Nadon to testify as a witness. Mr. Reid questions Mr. Nadon.
EXHA Informal trial brief and offer to settle
9:45am
Matter is submitted, evidence by both sides is retained.
10:10am
Parties return to the courtroom to inform the Court the case has settled. All exhibits are returned in open court. The case will be dismissed by the Court.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Continued To Jun-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: JUDGE PRO TEM MARY MCLAIN; CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-07-2008 Judgment Entered
